prompt_text:
### Demographics: 52-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Body mass index category: Normal
Major Depressive Disorder
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~20 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 64.2 kg; Height 175.2 cm; BMI 20.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 111/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.7%; 9 months ago 6.8%; 6 months ago 6.4%; 3 months ago 6.2%; current 6.1%), FPG (12 months ago 143mg/dL; 9 months ago 154mg/dL; 6 months ago 163mg/dL; 3 months ago 134mg/dL; current 132mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 64.2kg; 9 months ago 64.7kg; 6 months ago 64.7kg; 3 months ago 63.7kg; current 64.2kg), Height (12 months ago 175.2cm; 9 months ago 175.2cm; 6 months ago 175.2cm; 3 months ago 175.2cm; current 175.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 20.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 111mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 75mmHg; 9 months ago 76mmHg; 6 months ago 78mmHg; 3 months ago 77mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 29U/L; 9 months ago 23U/L; 6 months ago 27U/L; 3 months ago 29U/L; current 26U/L), AST (12 months ago 19U/L; 9 months ago 22U/L; 6 months ago 13U/L; 3 months ago 14U/L; current 18U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; current 20mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 171mg/g; 9 months ago 214mg/g; 6 months ago 206mg/g; 3 months ago 140mg/g; current 179mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 93mg/dL; 9 months ago 99mg/dL; 6 months ago 94mg/dL; 3 months ago 100mg/dL; current 97mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 50mg/dL; 9 months ago 50mg/dL; 6 months ago 47mg/dL; 3 months ago 47mg/dL; current 49mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 124mg/dL; 9 months ago 128mg/dL; 6 months ago 124mg/dL; 3 months ago 108mg/dL; current 118mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.9g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 10.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.77 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
